Create the following design task in the `LxifV` nodes.

  Task:
  Write the ScorePreview React component (src/components/export/ScorePreview.tsx) for the HarmonyForge Export Modal. This is the LEFT PANE of the modal.

Design spec from the .pen file:
- Container: w-[480px] h-full flex flex-col bg-[var(--sonata-bg)] border-r border-[var(--sonata-detail)]
- Header: h-[60px] flex items-center justify-between px-6 border-b border-[var(--sonata-detail)]
  - Text: 'Score Preview' font-instrument-serif text-[18px] text-[var(--text-on-light)]
- ScorePreview area: flex-1 relative overflow-hidden bg-[#F8F3EA]
  - PaperTexture: absolute inset-0 opacity-60 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#F0E8D8] to-[#E8DCB8]
  - 4 staff systems (Soprano/Alto/Tenor/Bass), each a row of 5 horizontal lines (h-[1px] bg-[var(--neutral-700)] opacity-50), gap-[7px] between lines, absolute positioned:
    - PSoprano: w-[400px] left-[40px] top-[50px]
    - PAlto: w-[400px] left-[40px] top-[98px]
    - PTenor: w-[400px] left-[40px] top-[146px]
    - PBass: w-[400px] left-[40px] top-[194px]
  - Note ellipses: absolute, w-[10px] h-[7px] rounded-full bg-[var(--neutral-700)] at various (x,y) positions
  - Stem rectangles: absolute, w-[1px] h-[24px] bg-[var(--neutral-700)]
  - Barlines: absolute, w-[1px] bg-[var(--neutral-700)] at x=40 (opacity-50), x=320 (opacity-30)
  - Clef symbols: absolute text-[32px] font-instrument-serif text-[var(--text-on-light)] opacity-60 at left-[42px] top-[38px] (treble '𝄞'), text-[28px] opacity-50 at left-[42px] top-[185px] (bass '𝄢')
  - A second system at y=260 with opacity-60, smaller notes (9px wide, 6px tall)
- PreviewFooter: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-[72px] flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-1 bg-[var(--sonata-bg)] border-t border-[var(--sonata-detail)]
  - Label: font-ibm-plex-mono text-[10px] text-[var(--text-on-light)] opacity-50 — '4 voices · 3 measures · 1 violation'
  - Sub: font-inter text-[10px] text-[var(--text-on-light)] opacity-35 — 'Last edited 2 min ago'

The component accepts props: { stats?: string; lastEdited?: string } with the default values above. It is a pure presentational component — no state, no hooks. Dark mode variant uses CSS variable overrides via a `dark` class on an ancestor.

Use only Tailwind v4 CSS variable syntax: bg-[var(--token-name)], text-[var(--token-name)]. No hardcoded hex values except for the paper texture (#F8F3EA, #F0E8D8, #E8DCB8) which are score-specific presentation values. Export as a named export. Full implementation, no TODOs.

We already started examining the target node and the overall document structure to understand what we are working with so we can start designing immediately:
